DESCRIPTION

The and functions lexicographically compare the null-terminated strings and

RETURN VALUES

The and return an integer greater than, equal to, or less than 0, according as the string is greater than, equal to, or less than the string The comparison is done using unsigned characters, so that is greater than The compares not more than characters.
